message.content: In the collabspace-server project under D:\project\pt-gitlab\collabspace\collabspace-server, find the backend API endpoints related to "文档操作限制" (document operation restrictions/limits). This feature controls what permission level is required for operations like create/edit documents, rename, delete, share, download. Search for keywords like "operationLimit", "operation_limit", "docOperation", "doc_operation", "permissionRequire", "actionPermission", "nodePermission" or similar. Show me the relevant controller, service, and entity code.
